mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, password, menu_id, res_date, start_time, end_time, status, memo, ins_dt, upd_dt FROM reservation WHERE res_date = #{resDate}
SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, password, menu_id, res_date, start_time, end_time, status, memo, ins_dt, upd_dt FROM reservation WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (customer_name, customer_phone, password, menu_id, res_date, start_time, end_time, status, memo, ins_dt, upd_dt) VALUES ( #{customerName}, #{customerPhone}, #{password}, #{menuId}, #{resDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{memo}, #{insDt}, #{updDt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET customer_name = #{customerName}, customer_phone = #{customerPhone}, password = #{password}, menu_id = #{menuId}, res_date = #{resDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, memo = #{memo}, upd_dt = #{updDt} WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, password, menu_id, res_date, start_time, end_time, status, memo, ins_dt, upd_dt FROM reservation WHERE customer_name = #{customerName} AND customer_phone = #{customerPhone} AND password = #{password}
